B[?.DK#sV5}h+wWa@7a0:
My game was to be a 2D puzzle platformer/collectaþon wiþ cursed mechanics, such as using concave polygonal hitboxes, "upgrades" þat are really just downgrades, and confusing sokoban puzzle interactions wiþ random articles of food existing because of plot necessity.

I þought I would be able to complete most of it in þe allotted time, despite being heavily hindered by TUSD's restrictions. But I þrew þis togeþer last minute just to have someþing.

It includes þe meal I planned to have unfold þrough þe course of þe game and necessary details. Þis is a demonstration of a meal plan þat fits wiþin MyPlate's recommendations to þe best of my knowledge, but þis game is partial satire and not meant to be take seriously.

TEXT: > ⅛ cup 3% reduced fat milk, ⅛ cup dairy. (Negligible but present.)
> Calling it “pickles” is false marketing; it's literally just cucumbers in water þat tastes funny.
> ½ cup blueberry compote, ½ cup fruit.
> ½ cup whole strawberries, ½ cup fruit.
> ½ cup mashed strawberries, ½ cup fruit.
> Þere is no protein in þis dish.
> NOT AN INGREDIENT. CLICK ℹ️ FOR MORE.
> Raspberry sauce. (Organic substitute for “Food Safe NyQuil Sauce”.)
> ½ cup of raspberries þat are blue because of plot necessity, ½ cup fruit.
> ¼ cup low sodium parmesan, ¼ cup dairy.
> 2 slices þin sliced bread, ½ oz per slice, 1 oz total.
> ½ cup blueberry compote, ½ cup fruit.
> ½ cup whole strawberries, ½ cup fruit.
> ½ cup mashed strawberries, ½ cup fruit.
> ½ cup of blue raspberries, ½ cup fruit.
Some odd product wiþ an abundance of food addatives:
> Boþ are food dyes for medication, like NyQuil, and
> All 3 are a savoury flavour enhancer. Any 2 are often paired.
